plan.annotation: Observed Q1–Q2 actuals; Q3–Q5 base forecast with modeled low–high range. Range is modeled, not a confidence interval.

operations.label: Observed and base forecast
operations.value: Actuals Q1 8.2, Q2 9.0; base forecast Q3 9.7, Q4 10.5, Q5 11.4

operations.label: Direct labels
operations.value: Label base forecast reaches 11.4 and Q5 range 9.0 to 13.8 as modeled values

plan.pptxFallback: In PowerPoint, the band is a translucent editable shape bounded by editable low and high lines; the observed and base series remain editable lines, preserving native editability per the contract.
plan.takeaway: Base forecast reaches 11.4 by Q5, while the modeled range widens from 9.0 to 13.8.
plan.title: Forecast vs. Actual with Modeled Uncertainty
